title: Leetcode 271. Encode and Decode Strings
shortDescription: Design a pair of functions to serialize a list of strings into a single string and deserialize it back losslessly, handling arbitrary characters and empty strings so decoding always reproduces the original list. The solution should be stateless, robust to delimiter collisions, and efficient in time/space.

Were You Asked This?
Leetcode 271. Encode and Decode Strings

Design a pair of functions to serialize a list of strings into a single string and deserialize it back losslessly, handling arbitrary characters and empty strings so decoding always reproduces the original list. The solution should be stateless, robust to delimiter collisions, and efficient in time/space.

Asked at:

OpenAI
